name: smart-traffic-monitor
description: Real-time Smart Traffic Monitoring System with Live Updates

scripts.init-db: mysql -u root -p < sql/schema.sql && mysql -u root -p < sql/seed.sql
scripts.reset-db: mysql -u root -p -e "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS smart_traffic_v2; CREATE DATABASE smart_traffic_v2;" && npm run init-db

author: Smart Traffic Team
